Query:
UNLOAD (SELECT bs."in.geometry_building_type_recs" AS geometry_building_type_recs, sum(1) AS sample_count, sum(bs.weight) AS units_count, sum(MAP(ARRAY['Mobile Home', 'Single-Family Detached', 'Single-Family Attached', 'Multi-Family with 2 - 4 Units', 'Multi-Family with 5+ Units'], ARRAY[0.5, 1.0, 0.8, 0.6, 0.4])[bs."in.geometry_building_type_recs"] * bs.weight) AS bldg_load_factor 
FROM resstock_2024_amy2018_release_2_metadata AS bs 
WHERE bs.applicability = true AND bs.upgrade = 0 AND bs."in.state" = 'CO' GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 1) 
 TO 's3://resstock-core/bsq_athena_unload_results/25386ccf857f333e36d8c0d24e5ac5ec66bbf3d3ab1d3e39fb51a3fd32b883cc/08c3e811-620e-40a1-aaed-c0c8701d21ee/' 
 WITH (format = 'PARQUET')
